exec_kpi_verified.phase: Phase 4 item 6 (stub resolved — Cloudflare is a validated client)
exec_kpi_verified.headline: qoq.q3.accepted (Q3-to-date accepted CS leads; 394 at verification, cross-checks qoq.q3.by_status Accepted 394 / Rejected 77 = 84% acceptance)
exec_kpi_verified.target: SUM(q3) over transmission.pacing.rows — the canonical market x tier plan table (q3 sum 2290; its q2 sum 3216 equals the dashboard's documented Q2 plan). The pre-fix target summed per-lead ALLOCATED_TARGET to 5,506 (the whole-year total) — corrected in scripts/build_exec_kpis.py the same day
exec_kpi_verified.series: pacing.rows is PER-LEAD; weekly accepted = count of LEAD_STATUS='Accepted' rows per DAY (STATUS is ~always null and LEAD_VALUE is 0 — the old series was empty)
exec_kpi_verified.db_crosscheck: Central keyKpi: Q3 Core DG · LinkedIn '210 Leads' + Google Ads '42 Leads' are the PAID-MEDIA lead targets (a different funnel from CS accepted); TTD rows carry CTR KPIs — consistent with this card measuring the CS lane

primary_kpi.label: Accepted lead
primary_kpi.definition: Salesforce-accepted lead from a targeted media-plan campaign
